title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: A retrospective discussion marking 10 years since AlphaGo defeated Lee Sedol in March 2016, examining how that match catalyzed the modern AI revolution. The speakers trace AlphaGo's foundational impact on subsequent breakthroughs in algorithmic discovery and scientific challenges like protein folding.
